input.title: [iOS PWA] Show =label with cursor but not caret
input.body:
The `=label` feature allows the user to override the displayed value of a thought. It should be based on the caret rather than the cursor. 

I suggest using the mobile emulator in Chrome to reproduce edit mode. 

## Steps to Reproduce

- Apple
  - =label
    - The Apple

Set the cursor on `Apple` (the first thought in the root) and close the keyboard. 

## Current Behavior

“The Apple”

## Expected Behavior

It should show “The Apple” because edit mode is off. If edit mode is on, show “Apple”.
